description_long: This object is a classic Sony PlayStation CD player console, featuring a rectangular, low-profile body with rounded edges and a central circular lid for disc insertion. The front panel displays two controller ports labeled '1' and '2', along with memory card slots above each port. The top surface includes two large circular buttons, one for power and one for opening the disc tray, as well as a smaller reset button. The rear panel is equipped with various AV output ports, a parallel I/O port, and a power socket, all clearly labeled. The surface is primarily a matte light gray plastic, with the iconic PlayStation logo in color on the lid and a small green power indicator. The overall design is compact and functional, with vented sides for cooling and a sturdy, hard plastic exterior.
description: A compact, light gray Sony PlayStation CD player console with a central disc lid, front controller ports, and rear AV connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing two controller ports, memory card slots, and the PlayStation logo on the disc lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vented cooling slats and the circular power and open buttons on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying AV output ports, parallel I/O port, and power socket, with clear labeling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vented cooling slats and a clear view of the open button.
